multiDevice.question: How many devices can I use with one account?
multiDevice.answer: Each subscription supports up to 5 devices online at the same time — phones, tablets, and computers. Share with the whole family.

connectionFailed.question: What if I can't connect?
connectionFailed.answer: Try: 1. Switch to a different node; 2. Restart the app; 3. Check your internet connection. If the problem persists, click "Live Chat" below to contact us.

purchase.question: How do I purchase a subscription?
purchase.answer: Open the app or visit our website, go to the Purchase page, and choose the plan that suits you. Multiple payment methods are supported.

platforms.question: Which devices are supported?
platforms.answer: We support iOS (iPhone/iPad), Android phones, macOS, and Windows — one account works across all platforms.

childSafety.question: Is this safe for my child?
childSafety.answer: We're launching child safety features soon to help parents manage access to inappropriate websites and keep children safe online.

contact.title: Need Help? Contact Us
contact.description: Our support team is here to help
contact.liveChatDescription: Click to chat with support now
